title: stevia elatior
intro: Stevia elatior, also known as sweet leaf or sugar leaf, is a plant species within the Stevia genus, native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves contain steviol glycosides, which have been shown to have health benefits including lowering blood pressure, reducing blood sugar levels, and aiding in weight management. Stevia elatior is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
